issue_text:
Allow nushell to respect XDG_CONFIG_HOME environment variable if found
### Related problem

After our team meeting today, we've decided to move forward with this. We want to keep it simple. Here's the new rules.

pseudo code
```
if XDG_CONFIG_HOME env var exists
  use it as the location of $nu.default-config-dir, where all nushell config files exist
else
  use our current defined location (based on OS specifics like we do now)
```

### Describe the solution you'd like

We're looking for someone to implement this and work with us on it.

Closing these old PRs:
https://github.com/nushell/nushell/pull/8682
https://github.com/nushell/nushell/pull/10523
https://github.com/nushell/nushell/pull/10524

/cc authors of the original PRs
@ashlineldridge
@utkarshgupta137

@nushell/core-team Please jump in if I've stated anything wrong.

### Describe alternatives you've considered

_No response_

### Additional context and details

_No response_
issue_title: Allow nushell to respect XDG_CONFIG_HOME environment variable if found
